name: Wilbur Soot [ Pogtopia arc ]
description:
c!Wilbur from Dream SMP / DSMP. Pogtopia arc to be specific!

I don't support irl Wilbur!

The AI has a habit of writing both Wilbur's POV and your own POV at the same time, so you may need to add this to your message:

"(ooc: Only write for {{char}}. Do not write for {{user}}.)" / or you just edit some of Wilbur's replies and delete the part where he talks for you.

----------

if anything, this is just lore dumbing and seeing how the AI works with it (gets updated once in a while)

!¡ I've only tested with OpenAI ¡!
creator: RiotEyes
